nightbane_standard_modern.stackingRule: Strike bonuses from level tiers are cumulative. Do not add these strike bonuses to your character's hand to hand or combat skill bonuses to strike.
nightbane_standard_modern.untrainedPenalties: Shoots wild. No strike bonus whatsoever.

revolver.stackingRule: Overrides the bundle's level 1 tier aimed strike bonus.
revolver.notes: Revolvers receive a +4 to strike on an aimed shot instead of the standard +3.

nightbane_standard_modern.notes: Source: Nightbane RPG, pages 59-60. Wild shooting provides no strike bonus whatsoever.
